title: MonitorGroupState
description: The state of a single monitor group (a unique combination of tag values)

status.description: The current alert status for this monitor group

name.description: The name of the monitor group, represented as a comma-separated list of tag:value pairs

last_triggered_ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds of the last time this group triggered an alert

last_notified_ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds of the last time a notification was sent for this group

last_resolved_ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds of the last time this group resolved from an alert state
